title: EARFQUAKE
lyrics:
[Intro: Tyler, The Creator & Playboi Carti]
For real, for real this time
For real, for real, for real this time
Bitch, I cannot fall short
For real, for real, for real this time (Uh, yeah)
For real, for real, for real this time

[Chorus: Tyler, The Creator]
'Cause you make my earth quake
  > [#1, 756 votes] Throughout IGOR, Tyler explores the topic of heartbreak, like he did on his March 2013 track, “IFHY,” which a May 2018 Complex article calls one of “The Best Hip-Hop Breakup Songs”: I fucking hate...
Oh, you make my earth quake
Riding around, your love be shakin’ me up
And it's making my heart break
'Cause you make my earth quake (Earthquake, ooh)
Oh, you make my earth quake
Riding around, your love be shakin’ me up
And it's making my heart break

[Refrain: Tyler, The Creator & Charlie Wilson]
Don't leave, it's my fault
  > [#2, 416 votes] Keeping with the track’s ongoing theme of earthquakes, Tyler creates a double entendre with the word “fault”. A fault is a thin zone of crushed rock separating blocks of the earth’s crust. When an...
Don't leave, it's my fault
Don't leave, it's my fault (Girl)
’Cause when it all comes crashing down, I’ll need you

[Chorus: Tyler, The Creator & Charlie Wilson]
'Cause you make my earth quake
  > [#1, see above]
Oh, you make my earth quake
Riding around, you’re telling me something is bad
And it's making my heart break
'Cause you make my earth quake
Oh, you make my earth quake (Earthquake, yeah)
Riding around, your love be shakin' me up
And it’s making my heart break (You already know)

[Verse: Playboi Carti]
We ain't gotta ball, D-Rose, huh
  > [#3, 295 votes] Derrick Rose, often nicknamed “D. Rose,” is an NBA point guard. Since being crowned the 2011 league MVP, Rose has suffered several injuries, which have caused him to miss over 250 games. However, in...
I don't give a fuck 'bout nothin', huh
Breathin' like fuck my lungs, huh
Just might call my lawyer, huh
Plug gon' set me up, huh (Yeah)
  > [#4, 12 votes] The “plug” (drug supplier) could betray him, or he’s worried about being set up in a broader sense (by people around him). A dual reference to street life and relationships.
Bitch, don't set me up (Okay)
I'm with Tyler, yeah (Slime)
  > [#5, 469 votes] The term Slime is southern slang that’s used to recognize friends or family. Young Thug popularized the term through his Slime Season mixtape series, and it can be heard amongst many rappers, most...
He ride like the car, huh
And she wicked, huh, yeah
  > [#6, 457 votes] Victoria Waldrip, better known by her nickname Woah Vicky, is a social media personality who achieved some notoriety in mid 2017 for her claim of being black. She’s also known for her feud with...
Like Woah Vicky, huh, yeah (Like Woah Vicky)
Oh my God, hold up, um
These diamonds not Tiffany, huh, yeah (Woah, woah)
  > [#7, 251 votes] Tiffany & Co. is a luxury jeweler founded in 1837. However, Carti may be bragging about his butterfly chain from IF & Co. Diamonds. In November 2016, IF & Co. even showcased Carti’s pieces on their...
So in love (I been so in love)
So in love (I been so in love)

[Refrain: Tyler, The Creator & Charlie Wilson]
Don't leave, it's my fault (Fault)
  > [#2, see above]
Don't leave, it's my fault
Don't leave, it's my fault (Igor, ayy)
'Cause when it all comes crashing down, I'll need you (Ayy, ayy)

[Bridge: Tyler, The Creator & Charlie Wilson]
'Cause you make my earth quake
  > [#1, see above]
I don't want no confrontation, no
And you don't want my conversation (I don't want no conversation)
  > [#8, 60 votes] Frank Ocean had a similar line on “Nights” from his album Blonde: Shut the fuck up, I don’t want your conversation “Nights” is about coping with relationship problems. Frank is irritated by his...
I just need some confirmation on how you feel, for real (For real)
  > [#9, 125 votes] Early on in the album, Tyler establishes his dependency to his lover. He would elaborate this further on tracks like “PUPPET,” where Tyler sees himself being insecure and feels that his emotions are...
You don't want no complication, no
I don't want no side information (I don't want no side information)
I just need to know what's happening 'cause I'm for real (For real)

[Outro: Tyler, The Creator]
I said don't leave, it's my fault (One)
  > [#2, see above]
I said don't leave, it's my fault (Two, two)
Don't leave, it's, it's my fault, girl (Three, three, three)
Don't, do-do-do-do-do, I'll need—
